lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

Note: this manual is built primarily on Cmdr Purrfect's Complete BGS Guide (sinc.science) — the definitive, experiment-driven 2025 reference — cross-checked against the Nova Force guide and live mechanics. Thresholds and durations are the community's best current measurements; the BGS is deliberately undocumented by Frontier.

sources.label: sinc.science BGS Guide
sources.what: Cmdr Purrfect's Complete BGS Guide v3.0 (2025) — the primary reference for influence buckets, conflict tactics, expansion/retreat timetables, and the full state effect chart.

sources.label: Nova Force BGS Guide
sources.what: Cross-check on superpowers, Powers, and state basics.

sources.label: Colonia Census
sources.what: Evidence-based state / mission / trade effect data (cdb.sotl.org.uk).

sources.label: EliteBGS
sources.what: Per-faction influence history charts and pending / recovering state tracking.

sources.label: EDDN
sources.what: Community data network aggregating the live BGS data feeds all the trackers consume.

sources.label: Frontier
sources.what: Official explainer for how the Background Simulation works, including conflict triggers.

sources.label: Inara
sources.what: Live galaxy / minor-faction overview — system control, faction influence, and current states.

sources.label: Fandom Wiki
sources.what: Background Simulation overview — how player activity drives faction influence and system states.

sources.label: YouTube — Down to Earth Astronomy
sources.what: BGS guide on conquering a system: working faction influence, the 100% influence split, and pushing one faction past the others.
